name: Mexican Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Green chiles; canned or finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together tomato puree, plain yogurt, green chiles, chili powder, coriander, garlic, and onion powder.
2. Place tortillas on a rack in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven. Heat until crisp for about 5 to 7 minutes.
3. Arrange the heated tortillas in a shallow baking dish.
4. Layer the cooked or turkey chicken over the tortillas.
5. Pour the sauce mixture evenly over the chicken and tortillas.
6. Bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 25-30 minutes.
7. Serve hot, garnished with grated sapsago cheese if desired.
8. This casserole can be frozen before baking. To serve, defrost and follow the directions above.
